text: Finnish President Stubb: In the past four months — and sorry for being morbid — Ukraine has killed or wounded between 30 to 35,000 Russian soldiers per month. They have done so 95% with drones, at a ratio of one Ukrainian dead to five Russians dead.
Finnish President Stubb: I think we Europeans have to understand that we need Ukraine more than Ukraine needs us. I think the tide has actually turned.

🇺🇸 Trump on the shooters manifesto: "I was waiting for you to read that because I knew you would because you're horrible people. I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody..." Norah O'Donnell: "Oh... you think he was referring to you?" Damn... cooked! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
Trump on the WHCA dinner shooter: I think the NFL should sign him up. He was fast.
text_zh: 特朗普谈白宫记者协会晚宴枪手：我认为NFL应该签下他。他跑得很快。

text: Trump: The reason you have people like that is you have people doing “no kings.” I’m not a king. If I was a king, I wouldn’t be dealing with you.
text_zh: 特朗普：之所以会出现那样的人，是因为有人在搞“没有国王”。我不是国王。如果我是国王，我就不会跟你们打交道了。

text: ELINT News RT @BarakRavid : Scoop: Israel sent "Iron Dome" system and troops to UAE during Iran war. My story on @axios https://www.axios.com/2026/04/26/israel-iron-dome-uae tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @BarakRavid：独家：以色列在伊朗战争期间向阿联酋派遣了“铁穹”系统和部队。我在 @axios 上的报道 https://www.axios.com/2026/04/26/israel-iron-dome-uae 推文

text: WarMonitor The president said he didn't fall while being escorted out by Secret Service. What do you think? https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048537750102499511/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 总统说他在特勤局护送下撤离时并没有摔倒。你怎么看？https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048537750102499511/video/1 推文

text: Trump: I am not a rapist. I didn’t rape anybody. I am not a pedophile.
text_zh: 特朗普：我不是强奸犯。我没有强奸任何人。我不是恋童癖。

text: Q: It looks like you go down. Trump: They said, “Please go down on the floor,” so I went down.
text_zh: 问：看起来你倒下了。特朗普：他们说，“请趴到地板上”，所以我就趴下了。

text: Q: Was the First Lady scared? Trump: I don’t want to say, and people don’t like having it said that they were scared, but who wouldn’t be when you have a situation like that?
text_zh: 问：第一夫人害怕吗？特朗普：我不想说，人们不喜欢被说成是害怕，但遇到那样的情况，谁会不害怕呢？

text: Q: How worried were you that there were going to be injuries? Trump: I wasn’t worried. I understand life—we live in a crazy world.
text_zh: 问：你有多担心会有人受伤？特朗普：我不担心。我了解生活——我们生活在一个疯狂的世界里。

text: Q: Do you know if you were the target of the gunman? Trump: I don’t know... I read a manifesto. He’s radicalized. He was a Christian believer, and then he became an anti-Christian, and he had a lot of change.
text_zh: 问：你知道你是否是枪手的目标吗？特朗普：我不知道……我读了一份宣言。他被激进化了。他曾是一名基督徒，后来变成了反基督者，他经历了很多变化。

text: The White House Correspondents’ Dinner was held with a lower level of security than typically used for events attended by top U.S. leaders, even though Trump, JD Vance, and several Cabinet members were present. The event at the Washington Hilton was not designated a National Special Security Event, meaning full federal security coordination was not in place. Source: WaPo
text_zh: 尽管特朗普、万斯和几位内阁成员出席了白宫记者协会晚宴，但该活动的安保级别低于美国高层领导人出席活动时通常使用的级别。在华盛顿希尔顿酒店举行的此次活动并未被指定为国家特别安全活动，这意味着没有进行全面的联邦安全协调。来源：《华盛顿邮报》

text: Trump said he delayed Secret Service evacuation during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting because he “wanted to see what was going on,”
text_zh: 特朗普表示，他在白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件中推迟了特勤局的撤离，因为他“想看看发生了什么”，

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says "he wanted to seem what was happening," that's why it took so long to evacuate him. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普说“他想看看发生了什么”，这就是为什么撤离他花了那么长时间。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender Speaking today on 60 Minutes, President Donald J. Trump said that he “wasn’t making it that easy” for and likely slowed down the Secret Service as they tried to evacuate him during last night’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington. https://x.com/60Minutes/status/2048511534582640943/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统今天在《60分钟》节目中表示，他“并没有让事情变得那么容易”，并且在昨晚华盛顿白宫记者协会晚宴期间，当特勤局试图撤离他时，他可能拖慢了他们的速度。 https://x.com/60Minutes/status/2048511534582640943/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Earlier, the United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) Centre reported an incident 6nm northeast of Garacad, Somalia, where “unauthorized persons” took control of a cargo vessel which was subsequently redirected into territorial waters. Per the release, the activity is likely from a pirate action group or PAG. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 早些时候，英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）报告称，在索马里加拉卡德东北6海里处发生了一起事件，“未经授权的人员”控制了一艘货船，随后该船被改道驶入领海。根据发布的消息，该活动很可能来自海盗行动小组（PAG）。推文

text: From today's stream! Larry Johnson drops a BOMBSHELL The Air Force and Navy commanders under CENTCOM have both told leadership that we should not restart this thing. Our best option is to get out and get out now. This has gone up to the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs. Larry: "If that holds up, we're essentially looking at the end of the war. They'll figure out a political exit. If Trump overrules them and orders them to attack - it's gonna be devastating for the US and for Israel." The military is telling the president to stop. FULL EPISODE!! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 来自今天的直播！拉里·约翰逊投下了一枚重磅炸弹：中央司令部（CENTCOM）下属的空军和海军指挥官都告诉领导层，我们不应该重启这件事。我们最好的选择是撤出，而且要立即撤出。此事已上报至参谋长联席会议主席。拉里：“如果情况属实，我们基本上是在目睹战争的终结。他们会想出一个政治退出方案。如果特朗普否决他们并下令发动攻击，这对美国和以色列来说将是毁灭性的。”军方正在告诉总统停止行动。完整剧集！！🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 🤡 🇺🇸 I ranian FM Araghchi officially concluded his visit to Oman, Iran's Strait of Hormuz neighbor. He's off to the next leg of his international tour - Moscow. 🐻 Truth Social meltdown in 5, 4, 3... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @NathalieTocci : Out now! Europe is facing real threats, and real choices. I was delighted to coproduce “Why Europe Matters”, a documentary that brings together voices from across the continent to make the case for a stronger, more united Europe. Watch the full film here https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=qwceYXqUVzA tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @NathalieTocci：现已发布！欧洲正面临真正的威胁和真正的选择。我很高兴能联合制作纪录片《为何欧洲至关重要》（Why Europe Matters），这部纪录片汇集了来自欧洲各地的声音，旨在为一个更强大、更团结的欧洲进行辩护。点击此处观看完整影片 https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=qwceYXqUVzA 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇸🇴/🇺🇸🇮🇱Somalia may restrict access to the Bab el-Mandeb Strait for countries that undermine the country’s territorial integrity, its ambassador to Ethiopia and permanent representative to the African Union, Abdullahi Warfa, said on X. "Any country interfering…" 🇸🇴 🌟 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Seizure of a cargo vessel off the Somali coast ➡️ The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) reported early this morning that a maritime hijacking incident has occurred 6 nautical miles northeast of the port of Garacad, Somalia. ➡️ According to the alert, unidentified armed individuals have seized control of a cargo vessel and diverted it toward Somali territorial waters. ➡️ No further details have yet been released regarding the crew, cargo, or nationality of the hijacked vessel, and investigations by the relevant authorities are ongoing. 🐻 Since the Somali federal government hasn't spoken on this, this is clearly an independent action by Puntland — one of Somalia's semi-autonomous federal member states. Unlike Isreali/USA-backed Somaliland , they are not separatists — they formally acknowledge the federal government, but operate in practice as an autonomous region with their own president, police and military. Garacad has been the center of Somali piracy since the early 2000s. To repeat what we wrote 2 weeks ago — Yemenis are just sitting on the shore and watching the world burn. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇸🇴/🇺🇸🇮🇱索马里驻埃塞俄比亚大使兼驻非盟常驻代表阿卜杜拉希·瓦法（Abdullahi Warfa）在 X 上表示，索马里可能会限制那些破坏该国领土完整的国家进入曼德海峡。‘任何干涉的国家……’” 🇸🇴 🌟 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 索马里海岸一艘货船被劫持 ➡️ 英国海上贸易行动办公室（UKMTO）今天清晨报告称，在索马里加拉卡德（Garacad）港东北 6 海里处发生了一起海上劫持事件。➡️ 根据警报，身份不明的武装人员已控制了一艘货船，并将其转向索马里领海。➡️ 目前尚未发布有关被劫持船只的船员、货物或国籍的进一步细节，相关部门的调查正在进行中。🐻 由于索马里联邦政府尚未就此事发表评论，这显然是邦特兰（Puntland）——索马里半自治联邦成员州之一——的独立行动。与以色列/美国支持的索马里兰不同，他们不是分裂主义者——他们正式承认联邦政府，但在实践中作为拥有自己的总统、警察和军队的自治地区运作。自 21 世纪初以来，加拉卡德一直是索马里海盗活动的中心。重申我们两周前写的内容——也门人只是坐在岸边看着世界燃烧。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Oil prices rise by over 2% in early trading. tweet

text: WarMonitor Reports out of Tehran say Iran is floating a new proposal: A permanent ceasefire across all fronts, including Lebanon, comes first. Then talks on Hormuz. Only after that, negotiations on uranium enrichment. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 来自德黑兰的报道称，伊朗正在提出一项新提案：首先在包括黎巴嫩在内的所有战线实现永久停火。然后讨论霍尔木兹海峡问题。只有在此之后，才进行关于铀浓缩的谈判。推文

text: Open Source Intel Former U.S. President Barack Obama: "Although we don’t yet have the details about the motives behind last night's shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner, it’s incumbent upon all us to reject the idea that violence has any place in our democracy. It’s also a sobering reminder of the courage and sacrifice that U.S. Secret Service Agents show every day. I’m grateful to them – and thankful that the agent who was shot is going to be okay." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国前总统巴拉克·奥巴马：“虽然我们尚不清楚昨晚白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件背后的动机，但我们所有人都有责任拒绝暴力在我们的民主中占有一席之地的想法。这也清醒地提醒我们，美国特勤局特工每天所表现出的勇气和牺牲。我感谢他们——并庆幸那位中枪的特工会没事的。” 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : @nikitabier @Shilllin No, it doesn’t, but it used to boost reach. That’s clearly gone now, so there’s little reason to keep paying. Take the WHCD as an example, misinformation and tinfoil posts pulled in millions of impressions, while factual accounts like mine were lucky to break 1K. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor：@nikitabier @Shilllin 不，它没有，但它过去确实能增加覆盖面。现在显然已经没有了，所以没有理由继续付费。以白宫记者协会晚宴（WHCD）为例，虚假信息和阴谋论帖子获得了数百万的曝光量，而像我这样发布事实的账号能突破 1K 就算幸运了。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 Former U.S. President Obama on WHCD shooting: Although we don’t yet have the details about the motives behind last night's shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner, it’s incumbent upon all us to reject the idea that violence has any place in…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WHCD shooting suspect Cole Allen’s manifesto has been released, outlining his stated intent to target Trump administration officials and accusing Trump of being a “rapist,” “pedophile,” and “traitor.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国前总统奥巴马就 WHCD 枪击事件发表评论：虽然我们尚不清楚昨晚白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件背后的动机，但我们所有人都有责任拒绝暴力在……中占有一席之地的想法。” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 WHCD 枪击案嫌疑人科尔·艾伦（Cole Allen）的宣言已经发布，概述了他针对特朗普政府官员的既定意图，并指控特朗普是“强奸犯”、“恋童癖”和“叛国者”。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰🇴🇲🇷🇺 The Iranian Foreign Ministry announced that Foreign Minister Araghchi has concluded his trip to Oman after holding talks in Muscat with Sultan Haitham bin Tariq Al Said and Omani Foreign Minister Al-Busaidi. Araghchi will next make a scheduled…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi reports that his meeting with senior Omani officials focused on how to ensure safe transit through the Strait of Hormuz in a way that is beneficial to all of their neighbours and the world. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰🇴🇲🇷🇺 伊朗外交部宣布，外交部长阿拉格齐在马斯喀特与苏丹海赛姆·本·塔里克·赛义德及阿曼外交大臣布赛义迪举行会谈后，结束了对阿曼的访问。阿拉格齐接下来将进行预定的……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 伊朗外交部长阿拉格齐报告称，他与阿曼高级官员的会晤重点讨论了如何确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全通行，以造福所有邻国和世界。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 Fox: New details on WHCD shooting suspect Cole Allen: - A manifesto reportedly stated he intended to target Trump administration officials - Investigators say his social media included anti-Trump and anti-Christian rhetoric - Was a member of a group…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Former U.S. President Obama on WHCD shooting: Although we don’t yet have the details about the motives behind last night's shooting at the White House Correspondents Dinner, it’s incumbent upon all us to reject the idea that violence has any place in our democracy. It’s also a sobering reminder of the courage and sacrifice that U.S. Secret Service Agents show every day. I’m grateful to them – and thankful that the agent who was shot is going to be okay. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 福克斯新闻：关于 WHCD 枪击案嫌疑人科尔·艾伦的新细节：- 据报道，一份宣言称他打算针对特朗普政府官员 - 调查人员称他的社交媒体包含反特朗普和反基督教的言论 - 是某个组织的成员……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国前总统奥巴马就 WHCD 枪击事件发表评论：虽然我们尚不清楚昨晚白宫记者协会晚宴枪击事件背后的动机，但我们所有人都有责任拒绝暴力在我们的民主中占有一席之地的想法。这也清醒地提醒我们，美国特勤局特工每天所表现出的勇气和牺牲。我感谢他们——并庆幸那位中枪的特工会没事的。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧The Israeli Prime Minister's Office announced that Prime Minister Netanyahu has ordered the IDF to attack Hezbollah positions strongly. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israel Hayom: Israeli officials say that Prime Minister Netanyahu’s public remarks regarding ordering a strong response to alleged Hezbollah ceasefire violations was intended to ease domestic pressure and shift blame for failures in Lebanon onto the IDF rather than signal any policy shift. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列总理办公室宣布，内塔尼亚胡总理已下令以色列国防军强力打击真主党阵地。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列《国土报》（Israel Hayom）：以色列官员表示，内塔尼亚胡总理关于下令对真主党涉嫌违反停火协议的行为进行强力回应的公开言论，旨在缓解国内压力，并将黎巴嫩失败的责任归咎于以色列国防军，而非发出任何政策转变的信号。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender “PS,” Allen said in the manifesto, “Ok now that all the sappy stuff is done, what the hell is the Secret Service doing? … No damn security. Not in transport. Not in the hotel. Not in the event.” He said that if he had been an Iranian agent, he could have brought in a machine gun, which he referred to as “Ma Deuce,” and no one would have noticed. Cole Thomas Allen, 31, the shooter in last night’s attempted terrorist attack on the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, wrote a “manifesto” that has since been found by federal law enforcement in which he stated his plans to target Trump administration officials, “prioritized from highest-ranking to lowest,” according to a copy obtained by CBS News. In his manifesto, Allen stated that he would not target members of the U.S. Secret Service, Capitol Police or National Guard, along with hotel employees and guests, but that he would still attack them to get to the administration, adding: “I really hope it doesn't come to that.” Allen also said that he would specifically not attack FBI Director Kash Patel, who was also attending the dinner at the Washington Hilton. - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender “顺便说一句，”艾伦在宣言中写道，“好了，既然所有感伤的东西都结束了，特勤局到底在干什么？……根本没有安保。运输途中没有。酒店里没有。活动现场也没有。” 他说，如果他是伊朗特工，他本可以带进一把机枪，他称之为“Ma Deuce”，而没人会注意到。31 岁的科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Thomas Allen）是昨晚华盛顿白宫记者协会晚宴未遂恐怖袭击的枪手，他写了一份“宣言”，后来被联邦执法部门发现。据哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News）获得的一份副本显示，他在宣言中陈述了针对特朗普政府官员的计划，并“按级别从高到低排序”。艾伦在宣言中表示，他不会针对美国特勤局、国会警察或国民警卫队成员，以及酒店员工和客人，但他仍会攻击他们以接近政府，并补充道：“我真的希望事情不会发展到那一步。” 艾伦还表示，他特别不会攻击同样出席了华盛顿希尔顿酒店晚宴的联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）。- OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel UKMTO statement: UKMTO has received a report of an incident 6NM North East of Garacad, Somalia. It has been reported that unauthorised persons have taken control of a cargo vessel which has been re-directed to within territorial waters. Due to the increased threat of possible PAG activity, vessels are advised to transit with caution and report any suspicious activity to UKMTO while authorities investigate. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel UKMTO 声明：UKMTO 已收到关于索马里加拉卡德东北 6 海里处发生事件的报告。据报道，未经授权的人员已控制了一艘货船，该船已被重新导向至领海内。由于可能存在海盗活动（PAG）的威胁增加，建议船只谨慎通行，并在当局调查期间向 UKMTO 报告任何可疑活动。推文

text: WarMonitor WaPo reports the Trump administration provided a lower level of security for the WHCD than for other gatherings of high-ranking officials. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048516355121418414/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 《华盛顿邮报》报道称，特朗普政府为白宫记者协会晚宴提供的安保级别低于其他高级官员聚会。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048516355121418414/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index The chances of a US recession this year have fall down to 24%, according to @Kalshi prediction market. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2048514907902226722/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 根据 @Kalshi 预测市场，美国今年经济衰退的可能性已降至 24%。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2048514907902226722/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Another vessel has been hijacked by Somali pirates -UKMTO A cargo vessel was reportedly hijacked off the coast of Garacad and taken to Somali territorial waters, as pirates ramp up attacks in the region. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048513524234588343/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 又有一艘船只被索马里海盗劫持 - UKMTO 据报道，一艘货船在加拉卡德海岸附近被劫持并被带往索马里领海，海盗在该地区的袭击活动正在加剧。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2048513524234588343/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Cole Thomas Allen, 31, the shooter in last night’s attempted terrorist attack on the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, wrote a “manifesto” that has since been found by federal law enforcement in which he stated his plans to target Trump administration officials, “prioritized from highest-ranking to lowest,” according to a copy obtained by CBS News. In his manifesto, Allen stated that he would not target members of the U.S. Secret Service, Capitol Police or National Guard, along with hotel employees and guests, but that he would still attack them to get to the administration, adding: “I really hope it doesn't come to that.” Allen also said that he would specifically not attack FBI Director Kash Patel, who was also attending the dinner at the Washington Hilton. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 31 岁的科尔·托马斯·艾伦（Cole Thomas Allen）是昨晚华盛顿白宫记者协会晚宴未遂恐怖袭击的枪手，他写了一份“宣言”，后来被联邦执法部门发现。据哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News）获得的一份副本显示，他在宣言中陈述了针对特朗普政府官员的计划，并“按级别从高到低排序”。艾伦在宣言中表示，他不会针对美国特勤局、国会警察或国民警卫队成员，以及酒店员工和客人，但他仍会攻击他们以接近政府，并补充道：“我真的希望事情不会发展到那一步。” 艾伦还表示，他特别不会攻击同样出席了华盛顿希尔顿酒店晚宴的联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇴 UKMTO reports unauthorized persons have taken control of a cargo vessel six nautical miles north east of Garacad, Somalia, and redirecting it to within Somalian waters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇴 UKMTO 报告称，未经授权的人员已控制了索马里加拉卡德东北 6 海里处的一艘货船，并将其转向索马里水域内。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from DD Geopolitics: 🇮🇷 🛸 💥 🇮🇱 Another angle of Hezbollah targeting the IOF evacuation group with an FPV drone. Seems the Israelis got very lucky. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 DD Geopolitics：🇮🇷 🛸 💥 🇮🇱 真主党使用 FPV 无人机瞄准以色列国防军撤离小组的另一个角度。看来以色列人非常幸运。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender Soldiers and equipment with Russia’s Africa Corps, including armored vehicles, towed artillery and rocket artillery, seen withdrawing from their barrack in Kidal, Mali earlier today, following a negotiated withdrawal with rebel forces, after a day-long siege against the barracks by fighters of the Azawad Liberation Front (FLA). tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 今天早些时候，俄罗斯非洲军团的士兵和装备（包括装甲车、牵引火炮和火箭炮）被看到从马里基达尔（Kidal）的军营撤出。此前，阿扎瓦德解放阵线（FLA）战士对军营进行了长达一天的围困，随后与叛军进行了谈判撤离。推文

text: ⚡ 🇰🇵 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 The recent visit of Russia's Defense Minister Andrey Belousov to North Korea gives us a glimpse of what appears to be an exposition of captured Ukrainian equipement. In this fram we see (right to left) a German-made Leopard 2A4, a French-made AMX-10RC and a VAB. While these are not the most modern western equipement, Pyongyang might get access to new technology thanks to these gift of Moscow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇰🇵 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 俄罗斯国防部长安德烈·别洛乌索夫最近对朝鲜的访问，让我们得以一窥似乎是缴获的乌克兰装备的展览。在这个画面中，我们看到（从右到左）一辆德国制造的豹 2A4、一辆法国制造的 AMX-10RC 和一辆 VAB。虽然这些不是最现代的西方装备，但平壤可能会因为莫斯科的这些礼物而获得接触新技术的能力。@wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index 6.1 magnitude earthquake near Hokkaido, Japan. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 日本北海道附近发生 6.1 级地震。推文

text: Open Source Intel Yesterday: A plane crash near Crystal Airport in Brooklyn Park, Minnesota killed two people, including North Dakota state Rep. Liz Conmy (D-NPL). https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048506329677889815/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 昨天：明尼苏达州布鲁克林公园水晶机场附近发生一起飞机坠毁事故，造成两人死亡，其中包括北达科他州众议员利兹·康米（Liz Conmy，民主党-无党派联盟）。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048506329677889815/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Mali confirms its defense minister Sadio Camara has been assassinated. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 马里证实其国防部长萨迪奥·卡马拉（Sadio Camara）已被暗杀。推文

text: Open Source Intel WATCH: Dramatic footage shows IDF fighters downing a Hezbollah bomb laden drone as wounded IDF soldiers are being evacuated from the village of Al-Tayyiba in southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048503768241602969/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 观看：戏剧性的画面显示，当受伤的以色列国防军士兵从黎巴嫩南部的塔伊巴（Al-Tayyiba）村撤离时，以色列国防军战士击落了一架载有炸弹的真主党无人机。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048503768241602969/video/1 推文

text: The IDF allowing this footage to be leaked is not for an innocent reason. They have a reason and they want to shed blood for it.
text_zh: 以色列国防军允许这段视频泄露并非出于无辜的原因。他们有自己的理由，并且想要为此流血。

text: Footage from the other angle confirms the second FPV missed. Soldiers were able to hear it and scatter in time. No casualties. Next time inshallah, after a valuable lesson was learned today, it will target the helicopter and score Hezbullah's first hit since 2006. The Israeli army will harm us more. They will kill us more. They will burn our houses and destroys our crops. The Israeli army should be punished, so it feels pain like we feel pain...until we get peace again and security. The yellow zone will be the Israeli army's new bloody security zone. It will take months or maybe years. Eventually dignified calm will be restored.
text_zh: 从另一个角度拍摄的画面证实，第二架 FPV 无人机未命中。士兵们及时听到了声音并四散开来。没有人员伤亡。因沙安拉（Inshallah），在今天吸取了宝贵的教训后，下一次它将瞄准直升机，并取得真主党自 2006 年以来的首次命中。以色列军队会伤害我们更多。他们会杀害我们更多。他们会烧毁我们的房屋，摧毁我们的庄稼。以色列军队应该受到惩罚，这样它就能感受到我们所感受到的痛苦……直到我们再次获得和平与安全。黄色区域将成为以色列军队新的血腥安全区。这可能需要几个月甚至几年。最终，尊严的平静将会恢复。

text: 🇲🇱 Mali's government confirmed the death of Defense Minister General Sadio Camara, killed during coordinated terrorist attacks on April 25. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇲🇱 马里政府证实国防部长萨迪奥·卡马拉将军在 4 月 25 日的协同恐怖袭击中丧生。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from НЕРЫБАРЬ: В «интернетах» за сутки уже успели пару раз окончательно сдать Кидаль боевикам и показать видео с эвакуацией раненых с десятка ракурсов. Но задать вопрос — а так ли всё на самом деле? — почему-то ни у кого язык не повернулся. Так вот, на весь городок Кидаль (на минуточку — центр целого региона) есть всего одна значимая достопримечательность: построенный французами Форт-де-Кидаль . Можно ставить что угодно на то, что займи боевики город целиком, они первым же делом побежали бы снимать с него флаг Мали, фиксируя «исторический момент» на камеру. Но таких кадров мы почему-то не наблюдаем. А значит, кто-то до сих пор контролирует не только южные окраины, но и ключевой опорный пункт — бывшую базу ооновской миссии, простреливая центр. И вот тут встает вопрос: кто же, если Африканский Корпус успел уже 100500 раз уехать, согласно экспертам?
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 НЕРЫБАРЬ：在过去的一天里，“互联网”上已经有几次传言基达尔（Kidal）彻底落入武装分子之手，并展示了从十几个角度拍摄的伤员撤离视频。但不知为何，没有人提出这样一个问题——事实真的如此吗？事实上，整个基达尔小镇（顺便提一下，它是一个完整地区的中心）只有一个重要的地标：法国人建造的基达尔堡（Fort-de-Kidal）。可以肯定的是，如果武装分子完全占领了该镇，他们做的第一件事就是摘下马里的国旗，并用摄像机记录下这个“历史性时刻”。但不知为何，我们并没有看到这样的画面。这意味着，有人至今不仅控制着南部郊区，还控制着关键的据点——前联合国特派团基地，并能对中心地带进行火力覆盖。于是问题来了：如果按照专家所说，非洲军团（Africa Corps）已经撤离了100500次，那么现在控制那里的人是谁？

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : http://x.com/i/article/2048401668660756480 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 转推 @Osint613 : http://x.com/i/article/2048401668660756480 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : First military art of the Iran War seen drawn by a U.S. Servicemember on the wall of a concrete shelter at Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan, recording around 77-85 Iranian drone and missile attacks against the base between February 28 and March 19, 2026. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048086891715510629/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender : 在约旦穆瓦法克·萨尔蒂空军基地（Muwaffaq Salti Air Base）的一个混凝土掩体墙上，发现了美国军人绘制的伊朗战争首幅军事艺术作品，记录了2026年2月28日至3月19日期间针对该基地的大约77-85次伊朗无人机和导弹袭击。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048086891715510629/photo/1 推文
